sections.sectionTitle: Singlamteh tungah a Kithat Khrih' Thu Gen

verses.text: Sanggamte aw, Pasian' thu hilhin note kiangah kong pai lai-in, mipilte' zat kam thukpipi leh pilna kamte ka zang kei hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh note kiangah ka om laitakin singlamteh tungah Jesuh Khrih a sihna thu simloh thudang peuhmah ngaihsutloh dingin ka ngaihsutsa ahi hi
Tua ahih manin note kiangah kong pai lai-in thaneemin, launa tawh ka ling a
thu ka hong hilh ciangin zong leitung mipilte' zat kammalte leh siamnate ka zang kei a, Pasian' Kha Siangtho vangliatna tawh thu ka hong hilh hi
Tua ahih manin note' thu upna pen mihingte' pilna hang hiloin, Pasian' vangliatna hangin a um na hi uh hi.
Ahi zongin kha thu lamah a khangham mite tungah pilna thu ka gen hi. Tua ka gen pilna pen tu-in a maimang kuankuanta ding hih leitung mite' pilna leh vangliatna thu hilo hi
Tua ka gen pilna thu pen mite' theihloh dingin Pasian in a ipcip Pasian' pilna thusim hi a, eite' minthan'na dingin leitung pian'ma pekin Pasian in a na koihsa thu ahi hi
Hih leitung a uk mite kuamah in hih pilna thu theilo uh hi. Thei hi le uh, a minthang Topa pen singlamteh tungah na thatlo ding uh hi

Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho sungah, “Kuamah in a muh ngeiloh, a zak ngeiloh, piangthei dingin zong a ngaihsutloh uh thu pen Pasian in amah a it mite-a' dingin a bawlkholh saksa ahi hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian in a Kha Siangtho tawh eite tungah tua thusim a hong langsak hi. Tua Kha Siangtho in na khempeuh kankhia a, Pasian' ngimna a ki-imcip a thutawng dongtakin a kankhia hi
Mihing khat' ngaihsutna pen ama lungsim bek mah in a theih mah bangin Pasian' Kha Siangtho bek mah in Pasian' thu a cingin a thei hi
Eite' ngah lungsim pen leitung mite' lungsim hilo a, Pasian in eite tungah a hong piak na khempeuh i theihna dingin Pasian' hong piak Kha Siangtho lungsim ahi hi

Tua ahih manin hih bangin thu ka hong gen uh ciangin zong, mihingte' hong hilh pilna kamte a zang hiloin, Kha Siangtho a nei mite tungah kha tawh kisai thu ka gen uh ciangin Kha Siangtho in a hong hilh kammalte zangin a gen ka hi uh hi

Ahi zongin Kha Siangtho a neilo mite in Pasian' Kha Siangtho in a hong piak nate sang theilo uh hi. Kha Siangtho a nei mite bek in theithei uh ahih manin amaute in tel theilo uh a, amau-a' dingin a haihuai thu khat ahi lel hi
Kha Siangtho a nei mite in na khempeuh theithei uh a, ahi zongin leitung mite in bangmah theilo uh ahih manin a lungmang uh hi
Tua ahih manin Lai Siangtho in, “Kua in Topa' lungsim thei a, ama gamtatna ding lam lak thei ahi hiam?” na ci hi. Ahi zongin eite in Khrih lungsim i nei hi.
